scripts.cf:types: wrangler types src/worker-configuration.d.ts --config wrangler.jsonc --include-runtime false --strict-vars false
scripts.cf:dev: vp run web#build && wrangler dev --config wrangler.jsonc --test-scheduled
scripts.cf:deploy: vp run web#build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.d1:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply aggr-hub --local --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply aggr-hub --remote --config wrangler.jsonc
